calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2023 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2022 Set For Trial On May-01-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS EDWIN MANGIBIN, SF LIMO WORLDWIDE, LLC, AND TIONGSAN VICTORIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Moving defendants' "motion to strike plaintiff's punitive damage allegations" is denied. Under Civil Code 3294, malice is "conduct which is intended by the defendant to cause injury to the plaintiff or despicable conduct which is carried on by the defendant with disregard of the rights or safety of others." The first amended complaint adequately alleges such conduct at the pleading stage.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2022 Continued To Apr-13-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Paulo S. Kline Simon, Esq. (925.315.5855; paulo@klinesimon.com) of The Kline Simon Law Firm for Plaintiff, (audio only).
Kevin Cholakian, Esq. (650.871.9544; kcholakian@cholakian.net) of Cholakian & Associates for Defendants.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS EDWIN MANGIBIN, SF LIMO WORLDWIDE, LLC and TIONGSAN VICTORIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT:
Parties to meet and confer. If court approval is needed, the motion is granted with leave to amend.

Plaintiff to submit a proposed order tracking verbatim the order of the court if parties' meet and confer result in need for an order.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2021 Continued To Mar-02-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
